## Summary

Describe the change and why it belongs in COSMOS-CQA.

## Verification

- [ ] Ran `npm --prefix apps/web run check`
- [ ] Added or updated contract tests when data shapes changed
- [ ] Verified public/dev behavior when UI behavior changed
- [ ] Documented any manual checks that cannot be automated

## Research-Only License And IP

- [ ] This change preserves the COSMOS-CQA Research-Only Public License terms
- [ ] I am not contributing restricted, confidential, proprietary, regulated, or personally identifying material
- [ ] I have the right to submit these materials
- [ ] Any third-party terms, notices, or attribution needs are documented

## Data And Provenance

- [ ] No restricted raw datasets or large binary artifacts are committed
- [ ] New sample data is synthetic, public-domain, permissively licensed, or referenced by manifest
- [ ] Provenance, checksums, schema versions, or report metadata are updated when applicable

## Public/Dev Boundary

- [ ] Public builds do not expose truth labels or reviewer-only metadata
- [ ] Dev-only behavior is explicit and documented
